description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage. Define a hidden .test template that runs the shell command 'make'. Add five jobs—test-25.3, test-26.1, test-26.2, test-26.3, and test-master—each extending .test, using the Docker images flycheck/emacs-cask:25.3, flycheck/emacs-cask:26.1, flycheck/emacs-cask:26.2, flycheck/emacs-cask:26.3, and flycheck/emacs-cask:master respectively, and executing the make command in the test stage. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
